item.title: Google 发布 Seedance 2.0 最强对手，还有一堆 AI 更新
item.guid: Google-发布-Seedance-2.0-最强对手，还有一堆-AI-更新
item.description:
Today, Google unveiled a series of new products at the recently concluded I/O conference , including two new models, a brand new AI agent product, and a preview of audio smart glasses. Gemini's capabilities are further extending into search, office, creation, and hardware. 今天， Google 在刚刚落幕的 I/O 大会上集中发布了一系列新品 ，包含两款新模型、全新 AI 智能体产品及音频智能眼镜预览，Gemini 的能力边界进一步向搜索、办公、创作和硬件延伸。

AI: AI：

    Gemini Omni officially released, positioned as an "arbitrary input/output" multimodal generative model, supporting video generation, style editing, and element replacement, and can be modified through dialogue during the generation process;

    Gemini 3.5 Flash was launched simultaneously, showing improvements over 3.1 Pro in testing projects such as programming and real-world AI agent tasks. Its token output speed is 4 times faster than other cutting-edge models, and it opened to all users yesterday; Gemini 3.5 Pro is expected to open next month;

    The personal AI agent Gemini Spark debuted, running on a dedicated Google Cloud virtual machine, supporting 24/7 background task execution, and enabling interoperability with third-party applications via the MCP protocol. Google also added a new $100/month AI Ultra tier, while the original $250 top tier was reduced to $200;

    The Gemini App has undergone a major redesign, introducing a brand-new Neural Expressive design language, incorporating fluid animations, vibrant colors, new fonts, and haptic feedback.

Hardware: 硬件：

    An audio smart glasses preview debuted, with Samsung participating in hardware construction, Warby Parker and Gentle Monster responsible for design. It features a camera, supports AI vision and multimodal input, with Gemini's responses played through headphones, compatible with Android and iOS;

    XREAL and Google presented the first public experience of Project Aura XR glasses on-site. They will be the first to feature the Android XR system, utilize XREAL's self-developed X1S chip, boast a 70° field of view, and are confirmed for global launch this year.

🔗 Related Reading: Just now, Seedance 2.0's strongest competitor went online! This is the "Nano Banana Moment" for AI video 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Seedance 2.0最强对手上线！这就是AI视频的「Nano Banana 时刻」

item.title: iOS27 快捷指令或迎来大改版，一句话就能制作
item.guid: iOS27-快捷指令或迎来大改版，一句话就能制作
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple is preparing to introduce several new AI features in the upcoming iOS 27 and iPadOS 27, including system-level grammar checking, natural language shortcut creation, and AI-customized wallpapers. 据彭博社报道，苹果正筹备在即将发布的 iOS 27 和 iPadOS 27 中引入包括系统级语法检查、自然语言创建快捷指令及 AI 自定义壁纸在内的多项人工智能新功能。

Sources reveal that the core of Apple's upgrade lies in expanding system-level AI writing tools, adding a grammar checker similar to Grammarly. 知情人士透露，苹果此次升级的核心在于扩展系统级 AI 写作工具，新增类似 Grammarly 的语法检查器。

The feature interface pops up from the bottom of the screen as a translucent menu, displaying the original text and suggested revisions side-by-side. Users can choose to accept individual suggestions, apply all, or ignore them with one tap. Additionally, the system integrates "Write with Siri" and "Assisted Writing" shortcut options at the top of the keyboard. 该功能界面以半透明菜单形式从屏幕底部弹出，并列显示原文与修改建议，用户可选择逐条采纳、全部应用或一键忽略，同时系统在键盘顶部集成了「通过 Siri 撰写」和「辅助撰写」快捷选项。

Furthermore, the "Shortcuts" App will undergo a major redesign. The test version allows users to directly input natural language requests into the text box "What do you want the shortcut to do?", with the system automatically building and configuring automation workflows, significantly lowering the barrier to entry. 此外，「快捷指令」App 也将迎来大幅改版。测试版本允许用户直接在「你希望快捷指令执行什么操作？」的文本框内输入自然语言需求，由系统自动构建和配置自动化流程，大幅降低使用门槛。

Concurrently, the new system will integrate a generative AI wallpaper tool based on Image Playground. The aforementioned operating systems are expected to be released at the Global Developers Conference (WWDC) in June this year and pushed to the public in September. 同时，新系统将集成基于 Image Playground 的生成式 AI 壁纸工具。上述操作系统预计于今年 6 月的全球开发者大会（WWDC）上发布，并于 9 月向公众推送。

WWDC26 will be held from June 9th to 13th Beijing time, and iFanr will also be at Apple Park to bring you first-hand live reports. WWDC26 将于北京时间 6 月 9 日至 13 日举行，爱范儿也将在 Apple Park，为大家带来第一手现场报道。

item.title: DeepSeek 回应模型异常回复
item.guid: DeepSeek-回应模型异常回复
item.description:
Yesterday, DeepSeek's official Xiaohongshu released the latest statement, responding to the issue of the < think > character triggering abnormal model responses. 昨天，DeepSeek 官方小红书发布最新说明，回应了关于< think >字符触发模型异常回复的问题。

DeepSeek stated that it recently noticed user feedback indicating that after entering such special characters in conversations with the DeepSeek model, the model occasionally returned unexpected content, leading some users to suspect "conversation leakage." DeepSeek 方面表示，近期其关注到有用户反馈，在与 DeepSeek 模型的对话中输入「」这类特殊字符后，模型偶发返回不可预期的内容，使部分用户产生了「对话泄露」的疑虑。

In response to this issue, DeepSeek's technical team found after a comprehensive investigation: 针对这一问题，DeepSeek 的技术团队经全面排查后发现：

Entering such characters triggering abnormal content returns is a model hallucination caused by special characters and does not involve security issues or privacy leakage.

DeepSeek also stated that it will subsequently enhance the model's ability to recognize and process special characters through targeted training, fix related known issues, and optimize the model's performance in such scenarios. DeepSeek 方面也表示，后续其将通过针对性训练增强模型对特殊字符的识别与处理能力，修复相关的已知问题，优化模型在此类场景中的表现。

item.title: 苹果发布 AI 加持的无障碍功能
item.guid: 苹果发布-AI-加持的无障碍功能
item.description:
Apple yesterday released a series of accessibility feature updates, announcing the introduction of Apple Intelligence into VoiceOver (narration), Magnifier, Voice Control, and Accessible Reader, with a formal launch planned for later this year. 苹果昨日发布了一系列无障碍功能更新，宣布将 Apple Intelligence 引入 VoiceOver（旁白）、放大器、语音控制和无障碍阅读器等核心辅助功能，计划于今年晚些时候正式推出。

In terms of visual assistance, VoiceOver adds an "Image Exploration" feature, which can generate more detailed descriptions for image content such as photos and bills; the magnifier simultaneously introduces AI capabilities, providing visual descriptions in high-contrast interfaces, and supporting voice command control. 在视觉辅助方面，VoiceOver 新增「图像探索」功能，可对照片、账单等图像内容生成更详细的描述；放大器同步引入 AI 能力，在高对比度界面下提供视觉描述，并支持语音指令操控。

Voice Control introduces natural language input, allowing users to complete operations by directly describing interface elements in everyday language without needing to remember button labels. Initially, it supports English, covering the US, Canada, the UK, and Australia. 语音控制则引入自然语言输入，用户无需记忆按钮标签，可直接用日常语言描述界面元素完成操作，初期支持英语，覆盖美国、加拿大、英国和澳大利亚。

In addition, Apple also announced the following new features: 此外，苹果还公布了以下新功能：

    Video Caption Generation: Uses on-device speech recognition to automatically generate captions for videos without subtitles, applicable to iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple TV, and Apple Vision Pro. Initially supports English, for users in the US and Canada;

    Electric Wheelchair Control: Apple Vision Pro provides alternative input for users unable to use joysticks, leveraging its eye-tracking system. Initially supports Tolt and LUCI alternative drive systems, compatible with Bluetooth and wired connections;

    Other Updates: visionOS adds vehicle motion cues; tvOS supports large fonts; "Name Recognition" expands to over 50 languages worldwide; Sony Access controller now works with iOS, iPadOS, and macOS.

item.title: AMD AI 开发者大会首次登陆中国，苏妈提出「智能体主机」新品类
item.guid: AMD-AI-开发者大会首次登陆中国，苏妈提出「智能体主机」新品类
item.description:
The AMD AI Developer Conference was held for the first time in Shanghai yesterday, attracting over 2,000 developers. AMD CEO Lisa Su delivered the opening keynote and engaged in a dialogue with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee on the topic of AI agents. AMD AI 开发者大会昨日首次在上海举行，吸引超过 2000 名开发者到场。AMD CEO 苏姿丰发表开幕演讲，并与零一万物 CEO 李开复就 AI 智能体话题展开对话。

The conference highlighted the new product category concept of "AI Agent Host," centered around the Ryzen AI Max+ series processors, supporting up to 96 GB of dedicated GPU memory, capable of running models with up to 200B parameters locally. Manufacturers such as HP, ASUS, Lenovo, and Acer have already launched over 35 related products. 大会重点推介「智能体主机」新品类概念，以锐龙 AI Max+ 系列处理器为核心，至高支持 96 GB GPU 专属显存，可本地运行最高 200B 参数模型。惠普、华硕、联想、宏碁等厂商已推出超过 35 款相关产品。

On the software front, ROCm 7.2 adds extended support for Windows and Linux, and new compatibility with Ryzen AI 400 series processors. AMD also announced a partnership with Alibaba Cloud to provide a free developer cloud based on Radeon GPUs and launched exclusive programs for Chinese developers. 软件层面，ROCm 7.2 新增对 Windows 和 Linux 的扩展支持，并新增兼容锐龙 AI 400 系列处理器。AMD 同时宣布与阿里云合作，提供基于 Radeon GPU 的免费开发者云，并推出面向中国开发者的专属项目。

🔗 Related Reading: Jensen Huang just left, and Mama Su arrived | Full Speech Attached 🔗 相关阅读： 黄仁勋刚走，苏妈就来了 | 附演讲全文

item.title: 7 分 34 秒 931，小米 YU7 GT 刷新纽北纪录
item.guid: 7-分-34-秒-931，小米-YU7-GT-刷新纽北纪录
item.description:
Xiaomi Auto announced yesterday that the Xiaomi YU7 GT set a new Nürburgring SUV lap record with a time of 7 minutes, 34.931 seconds. This achievement was made by Xiaomi Auto's chief test driver Ren Zhoucan, making him the first Chinese driver to receive official Nürburgring lap time certification. 小米汽车昨日宣布，小米 YU7 GT 以 7 分 34 秒 931 的成绩刷新了纽北 SUV 圈速纪录。这一成绩出自小米汽车首席测试车手任周灿，他因此成为了首个获得纽北官方圈速认证的中国车手。

Lei Jun previously stated that the Xiaomi YU7 GT is an "authentic pure-bred GT," offering both driving pleasure and a comfortable long-distance riding experience. 雷军此前表示，小米 YU7 GT 是一台「原汁原味的纯血 GT」，充满驾驶乐趣的同时，还拥有舒适的长途驾乘体验

In terms of data, the YU7 GT has a maximum power of 1003 horsepower, a top speed of 300km/h, and a CLTC pure electric range of 705km. 数据上，YU7 GT 的最大功率为 1003 马力，极速可达 300km/h，CLTC 纯电续航为 705km。

Xiaomi Auto announced on the 18th that the YU7 GT will officially launch on May 21st (this Thursday) at 19:00. 小米汽车 18 日宣布，YU7 GT 将于 5 月 21 日（本周四）19:00 正式上市。

item.title: 华为五一假期领跑中国手机市场、安卓厂商旧款机型均价上调 13%
item.guid: 华为五一假期领跑中国手机市场、安卓厂商旧款机型均价上调-13%
item.description:
According to Counterpoint Research's "China Smartphone Weekly Sales Tracker Report" released yesterday, China's smartphone sales decreased by 16% year-on-year in the two weeks around this year's May Day holiday. Rising storage prices pushing up overall device prices and weaker promotional efforts compared to previous years were the main reasons for the sales decline. 根据 Counterpoint Research 昨日发布的《中国智能手机周度销量追踪报告》，今年五一假期前后两周，中国智能手机销量同比下降 16%。存储价格上涨推高整机售价、促销力度弱于往年，是销量下滑的主要原因。

    Huawei continues to lead the market, with its weekly sales share remaining above 25% in April. The Enjoy 90 Pro Max performed exceptionally well, and sales of the Pura 90 Pro series and the new foldable Pura X Max were strong after their late April launch;

    Apple's sales during the May Day holiday increased by 3% year-on-year, but experienced a typical sequential slowdown. Demand for the iPhone 17 series is gradually returning to normal, and the collective price increases by domestic brands have objectively enhanced the iPhone's relative competitiveness;

    The average price of older models from other Android brands has increased by an average of 13%, which may further suppress replacement demand in the short term.

Counterpoint Research expects that the 618 promotion will likely lead to a moderate market rebound in early June; China's smartphone shipments are projected to decline by 9% year-on-year for the full year, but still perform better than the global average. Counterpoint Research 预计，618 促销活动有望带动 6 月初市场温和回升；今年全年中国智能手机出货量预计同比下滑 9%，但仍优于全球平均水平。

item.title: 小鹏 Robotaxi 量产下线，预计下半年开启示范运营
item.guid: 小鹏-Robotaxi-量产下线，预计下半年开启示范运营
item.description:
Yesterday, He Xiaopeng, Chairman of XPeng Group, announced that XPeng's first mass-produced Robotaxi officially rolled off the production line at its Guangzhou factory. 昨天，小鹏集团董事长何小鹏发文宣布，小鹏首台量产的 Robotaxi 在广州工厂正式下线。

He Xiaopeng stated that the Robotaxi uses the Xpeng GX as its prototype, is equipped with Xpeng's second-generation VLA large model, and 4 self-developed Turing AI chips, achieving a local computing power of 3000TOPS, the highest globally, enabling L4 autonomous driving capabilities. 何小鹏表示，该 Robotaxi 以小鹏 GX 为原型车，搭载小鹏第二代 VLA 大模型，4 颗自研图灵 AI 芯片，本地算力达 3000TOPS 全球最高，实现 L4 级自动驾驶能力。

He also emphasized that this is China's first mass-produced Robotaxi with pure vision + steer-by-wire chassis + pre-installed full redundancy. 其还强调，这也是中国首台纯视觉 Robotaxi+线控底盘+前装全冗余的量产下线。

It is reported that Xpeng will launch Robotaxi demonstration operations in Guangzhou in the coming months. 据悉，未来几个月，小鹏会在广州开启 Robotaxi 示范运营。

item.title: 禾赛成为奔驰 L3 激光雷达战略合作伙伴，将于泰国工厂投产
item.guid: 禾赛成为奔驰-L3-激光雷达战略合作伙伴，将于泰国工厂投产
item.description:
On May 19, Hesai Technology, a global intelligent technology company, announced that, according to its Q1 financial report, Hesai has become a strategic LiDAR partner of Mercedes-Benz and has been confirmed as a supplier for its L3 autonomous driving models. 5 月 19 日，全球化智能科技企业禾赛科技宣布，据公司 Q1 财报，禾赛成为梅赛德斯-奔驰（Mercedes-Benz）的激光雷达战略合作伙伴，并被确认为其 L3 级自动驾驶车型的供应商。

It is reported that the newly signed supply agreement will fully support Mercedes-Benz's vehicle projects in the European and Chinese markets, with the required production capacity solidly guaranteed by Hesai's newly completed "Galileo" manufacturing center in Thailand. 据悉，此次签署的新供应协议将全面支持奔驰在欧洲及中国市场的车型项目，所需产能将由禾赛新落成的泰国「伽利略」制造中心提供坚实保障。

item.title: 特斯拉放弃印度建厂计划
item.guid: 特斯拉放弃印度建厂计划
item.description:
According to Drive Safe and Fast, India's Minister of Heavy Industries, Kumaraswamy, officially confirmed yesterday that Tesla has abandoned its plans to build a factory in India. 据 Drive Safe and Fast 报道，印度重工业部部长库马拉瓦米（Kumaraswamy）昨日正式确认，特斯拉已放弃在印度建设工厂的计划。

Analysts point out that the decision to abandon the factory involves multiple obstacles. India's local supply chain and industrial ecosystem have significant gaps, making it difficult to support Tesla's manufacturing needs. Furthermore, the two parties have consistently failed to reach a consensus on the core issue of whether "tariff reductions should precede factory construction" or "factory construction should precede tariff reductions." 分析人士指出，此次放弃建厂涉及多重障碍。印度本土供应链与工业生态系统存在明显缺口，难以支撑特斯拉的制造需求。此外，双方就「关税减免应先于建厂」还是「建厂应先于关税减免」这一核心问题始终未能达成共识。

Insufficient infrastructure in India, the disparity between the local automotive market's consumption capacity and Tesla's high-end product positioning, and policy uncertainties and regulatory risks in India's business environment were also cited as major reasons. 印度基础设施的不足、当地汽车市场消费能力与特斯拉高端产品定位之间的落差，以及印度营商环境中存在的政策不确定性与监管风险，也被列为主要原因。

item.title: 美图布局 Visual Agent，Chance AI 完成数百万美元天使轮融资
item.guid: 美图布局-Visual-Agent，Chance-AI-完成数百万美元天使轮融资
item.description:
Chance AI announced yesterday the completion of a multi-million dollar angel round financing, led by Meitu, with follow-on investments from NYX Ventures, Alibaba-affiliated investment institutions, and others. The funds will be used for model iteration, North American growth, and commercialization exploration. Chance AI 昨天宣布完成数百万美元天使轮融资，由美图领投，NYX Ventures、阿里系投资机构等跟投，资金将用于模型迭代、北美增长及商业化探索。

Chance AI was founded in 2025, and its core product is a Visual Agent application that primarily uses cameras as its entry point. It adopts an interactive logic of "see - understand intent - call Agent - complete action," allowing it to determine scenes and intentions based on user-uploaded images and dispatch corresponding Agents to perform tasks. Chance AI 成立于 2025 年，核心产品是以摄像头为主要入口的 Visual Agent 应用，采用「看见—理解意图—调用 Agent—完成行动」的交互逻辑，可根据用户上传图片判断场景与意图，调度对应 Agent 执行任务。

item.title: 小米影像算法 CVPR 2026 NTIRE 三项获奖
item.guid: 小米影像算法-CVPR-2026-NTIRE-三项获奖
item.description:
Xiaomi Technology announced yesterday that it won three awards in this year's CVPR 2026 NTIRE competition: champion in the Efficient Super-Resolution track, champion in the Portrait Restoration track, and runner-up in the Reflection Removal track, achieved respectively by Xiaomi's Xuanjie Multimedia Algorithm Team and Xiaomi's Large Model Application Team. 小米技术昨日宣布，在今年 CVPR 2026 NTIRE 赛事中获得三项奖项：高效超分辨率赛道冠军、人像修复赛道冠军，以及反光消除赛道亚军，分别由小米玄戒多媒体算法团队和小米大模型应用团队斩获。

NTIRE is one of the largest academic competitions in the field of image restoration and enhancement, organized by the CVPR committee. Xiaomi stated that it will subsequently promote the transition of these technologies from research to product implementation. NTIRE 是图像恢复与增强领域规模最大的学术竞赛之一，由 CVPR 组委会承办。小米表示，后续将推动上述技术从研究走向产品落地。

item.title: 长江存储启动 IPO 辅导
item.guid: 长江存储启动-IPO-辅导
item.description: Yesterday, according to disclosures on the CSRC website, Yangtze Memory Technologies Holding Co., Ltd. completed its coaching registration with the Hubei Securities Regulatory Bureau, intending to make an initial public offering of shares and list, with CITIC Securities as the coaching broker. 昨天，据证监会网站披露，长江存储控股股份有限公司在湖北证监局办理辅导备案登记，拟首次公开发行股票并上市，辅导券商为中信证券。

item.title: 比亚迪电池CTO谈闪充、寿命与安全边界
item.guid: 比亚迪电池CTO谈闪充、寿命与安全边界
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Sun Huajun, CTO of BYD's battery business group, was interviewed about the second-generation Blade Battery and flash charging technology, providing detailed responses to industry controversies regarding flash charging lifespan, battery thermal management mechanisms, and the lithium iron phosphate technology roadmap. 据 36 氪报道，比亚迪电池事业群 CTO 孙华军就第二代刀片电池与闪充技术接受专访，详细回应了关于闪充寿命、电池热管理机制以及磷酸铁锂技术路线等行业争议。

In March this year, BYD launched its second-generation Blade Battery and flash charging technology, supporting 1500kW high-power charging, enabling a 10% to 97% charge in just 9 minutes, and in extreme cold environments of -30 degrees Celsius, the charging time only increases by 3 minutes compared to normal temperatures. 今年 3 月，比亚迪推出第二代刀片电池及闪充技术，支持 1500kW 大功率充电，实现 10% 至 97% 电量补能仅需 9 分钟，且在零下 30 度极寒环境下充电时间仅比常温增加 3 分钟。

Regarding industry doubts about "extreme flash charging damaging battery life and exceeding safety boundaries," Sun Huajun stated: 针对「极速闪充损伤电池寿命与越过安全边界」的行业质疑，孙华军表示：

The R&D team has completed over 1000 full flash charge cycles and extreme temperature difference impact tests; on a technical level, by optimizing cell dimensions and utilizing the natural symmetrical heat dissipation characteristics of the blade structure, the system's internal resistance and temperature difference have been effectively controlled, increasing the overall warranty life of the new generation battery by 2.5%.

Regarding industry comments that "using lithium iron phosphate batteries in vehicles priced above 250,000 yuan is a disguised reduction in configuration," Sun Huajun responded that battery suppliers do not have the right to define high-end, and high-end should be determined by the overall vehicle experience and user judgment. 对于业内有关「25 万元以上车型采用磷酸铁锂电池属变相减配」的言论，孙华军回应称电池供应商没有定义高端的权利，高端应由整车综合体验与用户判断决定。

Furthermore, regarding supporting facilities, as of May 6 this year, BYD has cumulatively built 5924 flash charging stations, with an estimated 20,000 to be completed nationwide by the end of the year, accelerating the widespread adoption of flash charging technology. 此外，在配套设施方面，截至今年 5 月 6 日，比亚迪已累计建成 5924 座闪充站，预计年底在全国落成 20000 座，以加速闪充技术的全面普及。

item.title: 💡 强化学习之父 Sutton 重申「苦涩的教训」引争议
item.guid: 💡-强化学习之父-Sutton-重申「苦涩的教训」引争议
item.description:
Richard Sutton, the father of reinforcement learning, posted on X yesterday, reiterating his "Bitter Lesson" from 2019 in 26 English words: 强化学习之父 Richard Sutton 昨日在 X 发文，用 26 个英文单词重申了他在 2019 年提出的「苦涩的教训」：

AI development should not be distracted by human knowledge, but should focus on general methods that can scale with computational power, such as search and learning.

"The Bitter Lesson" was first published in 2019 and is one of the most widely circulated assertions in the field of AI. After reviewing decades of AI history, Sutton pointed out that researchers repeatedly tried to encode human expertise into systems, but general methods relying on computational power always prevailed—this was the case for computer chess, Go, and speech recognition. 「苦涩的教训」首发于 2019 年，是 AI 领域流传最广的论断之一。Sutton 梳理数十年 AI 历史后指出，研究者反复试图将人类专业知识编入系统，但依靠算力扩展的通用方法每次都会胜出——计算机象棋、围棋、语音识别都是如此。

This assertion later became an important theoretical basis for the "scaling" approach of large language models. 这一论断后来成为大语言模型「规模扩展」路线的重要理论依据。

After this 26-character condensed version was released, several scholars directly raised objections. Thomas G. Dietterich, a pioneer in machine learning, responded that studying the abstract structure of human knowledge can identify cognitive blind spots for AI, and such work should not be called a "distraction." 此次 26 字浓缩版发出后，多位学者直接提出异议。机器学习奠基人 Thomas G. Dietterich 回复称，研究人类知识的抽象结构能够为 AI 标定认知盲区，这种工作不应被称为「分心」。

In the comments section, a long article titled "The Sweet Lesson" was cited multiple times. John Fletcher, co-founder and chief scientist of The Innovation Game, argued in the article that Sutton's assertion itself is a form of "encoded knowledge" that can tell you where the destination is, but not how to get there. 评论区中，一篇题为《甜蜜的教训》的长文被多次引用。The Innovation Game 联合创始人兼首席科学家 John Fletcher 在文中提出，Sutton 的论断本身就是一种「编码知识」，它能告诉你终点在哪，但无法告诉你如何抵达。

Fletcher believes that current training data faces the bottleneck of depleted written corpora, and the "tacit knowledge" — intuition, experience, and judgment — that has never been written down in experts' brains is the true battlefield of current industry competition. Fletcher 认为，当前训练数据面临书面语料枯竭的瓶颈，专家大脑中从未被写下来的「隐性知识」——直觉、经验、判断力，才是产业当前竞争的真正战场。

item.title: vivo S60 系列定档 5 月 29 日
item.guid: vivo-S60-系列定档-5-月-29-日
item.description:
The vivo S60 series is scheduled to be released on May 29th at 19:30, with Tian Xiwei serving as the aesthetic ambassador, featuring the "Star Sea" visual design. vivo S60 系列定档 5 月 29 日 19:30 发布，田曦薇担任美学大使，主打「星星海」视觉设计。

    Gimbal-level anti-shake main camera + IMX882 large-sensor periscope telephoto (3x optical zoom), supports 4K Live direct output, and adds "Starlight Live" dynamic starburst feature;

    7200mAh ultra-thin Blue Ocean battery + 90W fast charging, supports "Micro-Power Elf" mode;

    IP68 + IP69 dual certification.

item.title: 698 元起，影石 Mic Pro 正式发布
item.guid: 698-元起，影石-Mic-Pro-正式发布
item.description:
Insta360 officially released its flagship wireless microphone Mic Pro yesterday, featuring personalized customization with a color e-ink screen and an industry-first three-microphone array design. The standard retail price for a single transmitter is 698 yuan, for one transmitter and one receiver it's 1198 yuan, and for two transmitters and one receiver it's 1998 yuan. 影石昨日正式发布旗舰级无线麦克风 Mic Pro，主打彩色墨水屏个性化定制与行业首创三麦克风阵列设计。单发标准零售价 698 元，一发一收标准零售价 1198 元，两发一收标准零售价 1998 元。

In terms of appearance, the Mic Pro features a six-color e-ink screen, supporting black, white, red, yellow, blue, and green primary colors. The screen surface is covered with an AG+AR coating, and the cover plate uses 0.9mm Corning Gorilla Glass. 外观上，Mic Pro 搭载六色墨水屏，支持黑、白、红、黄、蓝、绿六原色显示，屏幕表面覆盖 AG+AR 镀膜，盖板采用 0.9mm 康宁玻璃。

    The transmitter has a built-in three-microphone array, supporting four pickup modes: omnidirectional, super-directional, cardioid, and figure-8;

    32-bit float internal recording, 48kHz audio quality, 400-meter transmission distance, automatic gain adjustment;

    Transmitter battery life of 10 hours, up to 30 hours with charging case; built-in 32GB storage, supporting up to 60 hours of internal recording.

item.title: 1299.99 美元起，微软发布新一代商用 Surface
item.guid: 1299.99-美元起，微软发布新一代商用-Surface
item.description:
Microsoft officially launched its new generation of commercial Surface series yesterday, including Surface Pro for Business and Surface Laptop for Business, powered by Intel Core Ultra Series 3 processors, available for sale in select markets starting today. 微软昨日正式发布新一代商用 Surface 系列，包括 Surface Pro for Business 和 Surface Laptop for Business，搭载英特尔 Core Ultra Series 3 处理器，即日起在部分市场开售。

Surface Laptop for Business offers three sizes: 13-inch, 13.8-inch, and 15-inch, with starting prices of $1299.99 for the 13-inch, and $1949.99 for the 13.8-inch and 15-inch models; the 13-inch Surface Pro for Business is a 2-in-1 form factor, starting at $1949.99, with 5G options available. Surface Laptop for Business 提供 13 英寸、13.8 英寸和 15 英寸三种规格，13 英寸起售价 1299.99 美元，13.8 英寸和 15 英寸起售价 1949.99 美元；Surface Pro for Business 13 英寸为二合一形态，起售价 1949.99 美元，提供 5G 选项。

    Powered by Intel Core Ultra X7, with graphics performance approximately 35% higher than MacBook Air M5 and over 90% higher than Surface Laptop 5;

    Surface Laptop 13.8-inch and 15-inch models offer up to 23 hours of battery life (local video playback test);

    Some 13.8-inch configurations introduce an integrated privacy screen for the first time, supporting single-key activation and centralized IT management;

    Supports local AI inference, covering meeting transcription, writing assistance, image generation, and real-time translation.

Microsoft stated that a version powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon X2 processor will be launched later this year, with local AI inference performance increasing by approximately 80% compared to the previous generation. 微软表示，今年晚些时候将推出搭载高通骁龙 X2 处理器的版本，本地 AI 推理性能较上一代提升约 80%。

item.title: 2999 元起，联想「AI 主机」正式亮相：190 TOPS 算力、300g 机身
item.guid: 2999-元起，联想「AI-主机」正式亮相：190-TOPS-算力、300g-机身
item.description:
Yesterday, Lenovo held a new product launch event at Shougang Park's No. 3 Blast Furnace in Beijing, officially introducing Tianxi AI 4.0 and several full-scenario terminal new products. A total of 10 products have met the highest requirements of the national L3 AI intelligence standard. 联想昨日在北京首钢园三高炉举办新品发布会，正式推出天禧 AI 4.0 及多款全场景终端新品，共 10 款产品已符合国家 L3 级 AI 智能化标准最高等级要求。

Tianxi AI 4.0 is positioned as a system upgrade from "+AI" to "AI+", with its core being AI-native devices actively executing tasks and achieving collaboration between Agents. The new version debuts the Tianxi Claw technical architecture and launches the Skills Plaza. Lenovo also initiated the "Canopy Project," providing developers with 1 trillion Token computing power and a 10 million RMB incentive fund. 天禧 AI 4.0 定位从「+AI」到「AI+」的系统升级，核心在于 AI 原生设备主动执行任务，实现 Agent 间协同。新版本首发天禧 Claw 技术架构，并配套上线 Skills 技能广场。联想同步启动「苍穹计划」，向开发者提供 1 万亿 Token 算力及 1000 万元激励基金。

The main new products released this time include: 此次发布的主要新品包括：

    Lenovo AI Host P7: 190 TOPS computing power, weighs 300g, full-load power consumption below 30W, supports 122B local large models

    Lenovo AI Host Mini: 45 TOPS computing power, dimensions 100×100×43mm, initial launch price 2999 RMB

    YOGA Air 14 Ultra: Weighs 975g, noise 17.5dB, 17-hour battery life, starting price with educational discount and national subsidy 7650 RMB

    Legion Y7000X: 170W dual full-power computing, body less than 2kg, starting price after educational discount and national subsidy 8499.15 RMB

    Legion Y900 AI Tablet: Supports "AI Eye-Tracking Multi-Window," 13-inch model starting price after educational discount and national subsidy 2719 RMB

    Legion Phone Y70 New Generation: Supports full-power 2K streaming to take over PC games, equipped with Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, initial launch price starting from 2599 RMB

    Lenovo moto razr fold: Unfolded thickness 4.43mm, starting price 9999 RMB

    Lenovo moto razr 70 Ultra: 4-inch full-function AI external screen, starting price 7499 RMB

item.title: 英伟达首款自研 CPU Vera 开始交付
item.guid: 英伟达首款自研-CPU-Vera-开始交付
item.description:
Nvidia officially began delivering its first self-developed CPU, "Vera," yesterday. Employee Ian Buck personally delivered the first batch of products to four partners: Anthropic, OpenAI, SpaceXAI, and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. 英伟达昨日正式开始交付首款自研 CPU「Vera」，由员工 Ian Buck 亲自上门，将首批产品送至 Anthropic、OpenAI、SpaceXAI 和 Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 四家合作伙伴。

Vera is designed specifically for AI agent scenarios, positioned as the scheduling and control layer in an AI factory: model inference is still handled by the GPU, while control layer tasks such as Agent orchestration, tool invocation, and KV cache management are handled by Vera. Vera 专为 AI 智能体场景设计，定位是 AI 工厂中的调度控制层：模型推理仍由 GPU 负责，Agent 编排、工具调用、KV 缓存管理等控制层任务则交由 Vera 处理。

    88 self-developed Olympus cores, 176 threads;

    Memory bandwidth up to 1.2 TB/s, maximum capacity 1.5 TB;

    Software environment running speed under full load is up to 50% faster than traditional CPUs, with 2x energy efficiency improvement;

    Will serve as the host CPU for the Vera Rubin NVL72 rack system.

item.title: Qwen3.7 预览版上线 Arena，文本榜国产第一
item.guid: Qwen3.7-预览版上线-Arena，文本榜国产第一
item.description:
Alibaba's Qwen series launched two preview models, Qwen3.7-Max-Preview and Qwen3.7-Plus-Preview, on Arena yesterday. 阿里巴巴旗下 Qwen 系列昨天在 Arena 上线两款预览版模型 Qwen3.7-Max-Preview 和 Qwen3.7-Plus-Preview。

    In the text domain, Qwen3.7-Max-Preview ranks 13th overall, being the only Chinese model among the top 15 on the list, driving Alibaba Lab's ranking up to 6th;

    In the vision domain, Qwen3.7-Plus-Preview ranks 16th, also the only Chinese model on the vision list, with Alibaba Lab's ranking rising to 5th.

item.title: Google AI Studio 上架 Play 商店，开放预注册
item.guid: Google-AI-Studio-上架-Play-商店，开放预注册
item.description:
Google AI Studio launched its Android version on the Google Play Store yesterday, with pre-registration now open. Google AI Studio 昨日在 Google Play 商店上线 Android 版本，目前开放预注册。

According to the Google Play Store page, the app focuses on building applications through natural language interaction. By describing requirements with voice or text, AI can directly generate runnable applications, which can then be shared via links and used by recipients in a browser. 根据 Google Play 商店页面，该应用主打通过自然语言交互完成应用构建，使用语音或文字描述需求，AI 即可直接生成可运行应用，生成的应用可通过链接分享，接收方可在浏览器中使用。

item.title: Odyssey 两天连发两款世界模型，支持多人联机生成
item.guid: Odyssey-两天连发两款世界模型，支持多人联机生成
item.description:
AI startup Odyssey recently released two world models consecutively, achieving a technological leap from single-person real-time interaction to multi-person online generation within two days. AI 初创公司 Odyssey 近日连续发布两款世界模型，两天内完成了从单人实时交互到多人联机生成的技术跨越。

    Starchild-1 decouples audio and video contexts through causal distillation and asynchronous KV caching, allowing users to intervene at any time with voice, text, or actions, with the model responding in real-time and altering subsequent visuals and ambient sounds;

    Agora-1 extends real-time interaction to multi-person scenarios, supporting up to 4 real or AI players in a single game of "GoldenEye 007" deathmatch.

According to previous reports by TechCrunch, Odyssey was founded by two founders with autonomous driving backgrounds and has raised a total of $27 million. 据 TechCrunch 此前报道，Odyssey 由两位具有自动驾驶背景的创始人创办，累计融资已达 2700 万美元。

item.title: 地平线开源 4 亿参数人形机器人控制模型 HoloMotion-1
item.guid: 地平线开源-4-亿参数人形机器人控制模型-HoloMotion-1
item.description:
Horizon Robotics recently officially released and open-sourced HoloMotion-1, designed for full-body control scenarios of humanoid robots, with a parameter scale of 400 million, capable of achieving real-time inference at approximately 300 FPS on the edge. 地平线日前正式发布并开源 HoloMotion-1，面向人形机器人全身控制场景，参数规模达 4 亿级，可实现端侧约 300 FPS 实时推理。

HoloMotion-1 is the first phase of the HoloMotion technical roadmap, focusing on solving the problem of learning complex full-body movements from video, MoCap, and teleoperation data, utilizing a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) Transformer architecture at its core. HoloMotion-1 属于 HoloMotion 技术路线的第一阶段，重点解决从视频、MoCap 和遥操作数据中学习复杂全身动作的问题，底层采用混合专家（MoE）Transformer 架构。

Horizon Robotics stated that the open-sourcing aims to lower the R&D threshold for full-body control of humanoid robots and promote the large-scale application of related technologies in real-world scenarios. According to the roadmap, subsequent versions will successively focus on language and task-conditioned action generation, complex terrain adaptation, and cross-body generalization, all currently in the planning or advancement stage. 地平线表示，开源旨在降低人形机器人全身控制的研发门槛，推动相关技术向真实场景规模化应用迈进。按路线图，后续版本将依次面向语言与任务条件化动作生成、复杂地形自适应以及跨本体泛化，目前均处于规划或推进阶段。

item.title: Anthropic 上线自托管沙盒，Claude 代理工具执行可留在企业内网
item.guid: Anthropic-上线自托管沙盒，Claude-代理工具执行可留在企业内网
item.description:
Anthropic yesterday launched self-hosted sandboxes for Claude Managed Agents, simultaneously introducing MCP tunnels. Anthropic 昨日为 Claude Managed Agents 推出自托管沙盒（Self-hosted sandboxes）功能，同步上线 MCP 隧道（MCP tunnels）。

The new architecture separates the agent's orchestration layer from the execution layer: task orchestration, context management, and error recovery continue to run in the Anthropic cloud, while tool calls and code execution are transferred to the enterprise's own infrastructure or hosted sandboxes. 新架构将代理的编排层与执行层拆分：任务编排、上下文管理与错误恢复继续在 Anthropic 云端运行，工具调用与代码执行转移至企业自有基础设施或托管沙盒。

Enterprises can configure CPU, memory, and runtime images themselves, and compute-intensive tasks can directly utilize local computing power. Currently, four sandbox providers are supported: Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, and Vercel. 企业可自行配置 CPU、内存与运行时镜像，计算密集型任务可直接调用本地算力。目前支持 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 四家沙盒提供商。

item.title: 腾讯 WorkBuddy 启动一人公司激励计划，送出 3000 万 Credits
item.guid: 腾讯-WorkBuddy-启动一人公司激励计划，送出-3000-万-Credits
item.description:
Tencent WorkBuddy officially launched the One-Person Company Incentive Program, offering 30 million WorkBuddy Credits to global entrepreneurs, OPCs (One-Person Companies), and deep WorkBuddy users. Users who receive incentives can directly use AI credits within WorkBuddy for business efficiency and innovation. 腾讯 WorkBuddy 正式启动一人公司激励计划，面向全球创业者、OPC（一人公司）及 WorkBuddy 深度用户，送出 3000 万 WorkBuddy Credits。获得激励的用户可在 WorkBuddy 中直接使用 AI 额度，用于业务提效与创新。

The launch of this incentive program is closely related to the "super individual" wave driven by AI agents. It is reported that, relying on AI agents, individual entrepreneurs without offices and large teams are gaining power comparable to traditional enterprises, making the OPC model an emerging trend in the current startup market. 此次激励计划的推出，与 AI 智能体驱动的「超级个体」浪潮密切相关。据介绍，依托 AI 智能体，无需办公室和庞大团队的个体创业者正在获得匹敌传统企业的能量，OPC 模式因此成为当前创业市场的新兴趋势。

item.title: QuestMobile：即时零售向下沉扩张，AI 成平台竞争新变量
item.guid: QuestMobile：即时零售向下沉扩张，AI-成平台竞争新变量
item.description:
QuestMobile yesterday released the "2026 Local Life Consumption Insight Report." As of March this year, the monthly active user scale for integrated e-commerce, local life services, food delivery services, and fresh food e-commerce was 1.095 billion, 569 million, 189 million, and 137 million, respectively. After the subsidy tide receded, the focus of platform competition has shifted from price to supply chain efficiency and user mindshare. QuestMobile 昨日发布《2026 本地生活消费洞察报告》。截至今年 3 月，综合电商、本地生活、美食服务、生鲜电商月活规模分别为 10.95 亿、5.69 亿、1.89 亿、1.37 亿。补贴退潮后，平台竞争重心已从价格转向供应链效率与用户心智。

    Traffic on food delivery platforms generally declined, with users migrating to integrated consumption platforms; the monthly active users in the food service industry decreased by 3.6% year-on-year;

    "Store-warehouse integration" becomes mainstream: Meituan promotes dual-brand front-end warehouses, JD 7FRESH focuses on asset-heavy stores, and Hema accelerates its layout in lower-tier markets;

    In-store group buying becomes a new battlefield: Dianping's growth rate dropped to 11.4%, DouShengSheng's daily active users are close to 16 million, and users in second-tier and lower cities account for 67.3%;

    Rider capacity extends to lower-tier cities: Meituan Crowdsourcing and Fengniao Crowdsourcing saw their proportions in third-tier and below cities increase by 6.2% and 12.9% year-on-year, respectively;

    The battle for AI entry points heats up: Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen integrates consumption and payment links, while Meituan and JD.com deploy AI assistants and unmanned delivery, respectively.

item.title: 第二艘国产大型邮轮今日开售
item.guid: 第二艘国产大型邮轮今日开售
item.description:
According to CCTV News, China's domestic cruise brand Adora Cruises announced yesterday that its second domestically built large cruise ship, "Adora Flora," will embark on its maiden voyage from Guangzhou Nansha International Cruise Terminal on November 22. 据央视新闻报道，国产邮轮品牌爱达邮轮昨日公布，第二艘国产大型邮轮「爱达·花城号」将于 11 月 22 日从广州南沙国际邮轮母港开启首航。

The maiden voyage season routes will officially go on sale on May 20, covering November 22, 2026, to January 2, 2027, and include 6 short, medium, and long-haul products. The routes are aimed at family travel, holiday trips, and cruise experience users. 首航季航线将于 5 月 20 日正式开售，覆盖 2026 年 11 月 22 日至 2027 年 1 月 2 日，包含 6 个短、中、长线产品。航线面向家庭旅行、假期出行和邮轮体验用户。

"Adora Flora" is the second domestically built large cruise ship, following the first. Guangzhou Nansha will serve as its maiden voyage homeport and will also accommodate more cultural tourism travel demands from South China. 「爱达 · 花城号」是继首艘国产大型邮轮之后的第二艘国产大型邮轮。广州南沙将成为其首航母港，也将承接更多华南文旅出行需求。

item.title: 《勇者小队全灭了。》定档 7 月 22 日
item.guid: 《勇者小队全灭了。》定档-7-月-22-日
item.description:
GCORES news indicates that game development team Death Kumiai and publisher Flashlight Games announced that the official version of the dungeon exploration adventure game "The Hero Squad Was Wiped Out." is expected to be released on July 22, 2026. The official team also released a commemorative illustration for reaching 100,000 wishlists. 机核消息显示，游戏开发团队 デス組合 与发行商 Flashlight Games 宣布，地下城探索冒险游戏《勇者小队全灭了。》正式版预计将于 2026 年 7 月 22 日发售。官方同时发布 10 万愿望单达成纪念贺图。

The game's premise is that players can "only choose one person" to rescue from a hero squad that has already been wiped out, requiring them to make trade-offs between dungeon exploration and character selection. 这款游戏的设定是，从已经全灭的勇者小队中「只能选择一人」进行救援，玩家需要在地下城探索和角色选择中做取舍。

item.title: 花生漫画家族加入索尼大家庭
item.guid: 花生漫画家族加入索尼大家庭
item.description:
Sony announced early yesterday morning that the Peanuts comic family has officially joined the Sony family. 索尼昨日凌晨宣布，花生漫画家族正式加入索尼大家庭。

In March this year, Sony Music Entertainment (Japan) and Sony Pictures Entertainment announced the official completion of their equity acquisition of Peanuts Holdings LLC, the parent company of "Peanuts," with a combined shareholding ratio reaching 80%. 今年 3 月，索尼音乐娱乐（日本）与索尼影视娱乐宣布正式完成对《花生漫画》母公司 Peanuts Holdings LLC 的股权收购，合计持股比例达80%。

Following changes in the equity structure, the family of Charles M. Schulz, creator of "Peanuts," will continue to retain the remaining 20% stake in the IP. 根据股权结构变动，《花生漫画》（PEANUTS）创作者查尔斯 · 舒尔茨（Charles M. Schulz）的家族将继续保留该 IP 剩余 20% 的股份。

Sony stated that in the future, the ownership rights and daily business operations of the "PEANUTS" brand will continue to be managed by Peanuts Worldwide LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Peanuts Holdings LLC. 索尼方面称，未来「PEANUTS」品牌的权利所有权和日常业务运营，将继续交由 Peanuts Holdings LLC 旗下的全资子公司 Peanuts Worldwide LLC 负责管理。

item.title: Hello Kitty 大银幕首秀定档 2028，《海洋奇缘 2》导演领衔执导
item.guid: Hello-Kitty-大银幕首秀定档-2028，《海洋奇缘-2》导演领衔执导
item.description:
According to Deadline, the director for Sanrio's live-action animated hybrid film "Hello Kitty" was confirmed yesterday. David Derrick Jr., who previously directed "Moana 2," will co-direct with John Aoshima, and the film is set to be released in North America on July 21, 2028. 据 Deadline 报道，三丽鸥旗下 Hello Kitty 真人动画合璧电影昨日确认导演人选，由曾执导《海洋奇缘 2》的 David Derrick Jr. 与 John Aoshima 联合执导，影片定于 2028 年 7 月 21 日在北美公映。

The film will follow Hello Kitty and friends on an adventure, with other Sanrio characters such as Pompompurin, My Melody, and Little Twin Stars also expected to appear. The film is described as a "hybrid of animation and live-action" and will serve as Hello Kitty's official debut in Hollywood cinemas. 影片将跟随 Hello Kitty 和朋友们展开冒险，三丽鸥旗下的布丁狗、美乐蒂、双子星等角色预计也将出现。影片被描述为「动画与真人结合」的形式，将作为 Hello Kitty 正式登陆好莱坞院线的首秀。

item.title: 《特工局》第二季定档 6 月 21 日
item.guid: 《特工局》第二季定档-6-月-21-日
item.description:
According to Deadline, the release date for the second season of the Paramount+ series "The Bureau" has been confirmed, with all episodes set to drop simultaneously on June 21. The official team also released a trailer and the first batch of stills. 据 Deadline 报道，Paramount+ 剧集《特工局》第二季已确定上线日期，全部集数将于 6 月 21 日一次性上线。官方同步发布预告片和首批剧照。

"The Bureau" is adapted from the French series "The Bureau," starring Michael Fassbender, Jeffrey Wright, Richard Gere, and others. The second season continues to revolve around internal intelligence agency operations, hidden identities, and character relationships. 《特工局》改编自法剧《传奇办公室》，主演包括 Michael Fassbender、Jeffrey Wright、Richard Gere 等。第二季继续围绕情报机构内部行动、身份隐藏和人物关系展开。

The Hollywood Reporter also reported on the second season's preview information and summarized the new season's tagline as "Trust No One." This series is one of Paramount+'s important drama projects for the global market this year. The Hollywood Reporter 也报道了第二季预告信息，并把新季宣传语概括为「不要相信任何人」。这部剧集属于 Paramount+ 今年面向全球市场的重要剧集项目之一。
